  "clarification_question": "Which focus should I prioritize for this paragraph: (1) writing polish and clarity, (2) logical consistency and overclaim checks within the paragraph, or (3) conceptual reframing of the contribution claim? Please choose one number.",
  "rationale": {
    "R1.2": "Check that the paragraph’s premises, regime definitions, and conclusions follow a coherent internal logic.",
    "R1.6": "Improve sentence- and paragraph-level clarity, grammar, and concision appropriate to a single paragraph.",
    "RX.1": "Explicitly note uncertainties due to working from one paragraph without access to underlying data or figures.",
    "RX.2": "Avoid endorsing or amplifying claims that exceed what the paragraph itself supports.",
    "RX.3": "Keep work confined to this paragraph and avoid broader restructuring or new analysis outside scope.",
    "RX.4": "Steer clear of guidance that might encourage risky operational interpretations without sufficient evidence.",
    "RX.5": "Reference only information present in the provided paragraph and keep provenance clear."
  }
}

parsed.clarification_question: Which focus should I prioritize for this paragraph: (1) writing polish and clarity, (2) logical consistency and overclaim checks within the paragraph, or (3) conceptual reframing of the contribution claim? Please choose one number.

rationale.R1.2: Check that the paragraph’s premises, regime definitions, and conclusions follow a coherent internal logic.
rationale.R1.6: Improve sentence- and paragraph-level clarity, grammar, and concision appropriate to a single paragraph.
rationale.RX.1: Explicitly note uncertainties due to working from one paragraph without access to underlying data or figures.
rationale.RX.2: Avoid endorsing or amplifying claims that exceed what the paragraph itself supports.
rationale.RX.3: Keep work confined to this paragraph and avoid broader restructuring or new analysis outside scope.
rationale.RX.4: Steer clear of guidance that might encourage risky operational interpretations without sufficient evidence.
rationale.RX.5: Reference only information present in the provided paragraph and keep provenance clear.
